name: Steel City Simulators
about: Steel City Simulators is an indoor sports simulation venue located in North Huntingdon, PA. It features Trackman technology in three simulator bays, allowing for year-round play on over 200 of the world's greatest golf courses. The facility caters to a wide range of activities beyond golf, including baseball, football, basketball, lacrosse, and various shooting and carnival-style games. Pricing is straightforward, starting at $50 per hour for up to six guests per bay, with options for private events and leagues.
why_golfers_like_it: Realistic gameplay powered by state-of-the-art Trackman radar technology
Access to over 200 championship courses for all-season play
App integration allows for stat tracking and performance analysis
Accommodates up to 6 players per bay for group play

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of alcohol service or BYOB policy.

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art radar technology trusted by tour players and coaches for tracking and simulation.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You will need to bring your own golf clubs to play on the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Food is available upon request at the venue. There is no mention of a BYOB policy for alcohol.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify an exact time for playing 18 holes, but it provides pricing on a per-hour basis.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Steel City Simulators welcomes individuals of all ages and sizes, and offers various games and activities suitable for kids, like Wild West Shootout and Zombie Dodgeball.
